name: Stunning Surge Crystal
description: This weapon is broad and heavy compared to other weapons of its kind. Its rough but solid craftsmanship bespeaks straightforward functionality. On a successful melee attack, you can command this weapon to emit a surge of magical energy. Unless the target succeeds on a Fortitude save (DC 10 + 1/2 your character level + your Cha modifier), it is stunned for 1 round. This ability is usable a number of times per day equal to 1+ your Charisma bonus (if any).
unidentifiedDesc: A broad, heavy weapon augmentation crystal.
